# Oharu (오하루)
> The simplest free to-do list, focused only on today. Web app + Windows desktop widget.
> 오늘 할 일에만 집중하는 가장 단순한 무료 투두리스트. 웹 + 윈도우 바탕화면 위젯.
- Web app: https://oharu.today
- Windows widget download: https://github.com/tjtjsdud417-boop/oharu/releases/latest/download/Oharu.exe
- Privacy: https://oharu.today/privacy
- Languages: Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish
- Free. Guest mode works without sign-up; sign in to sync across devices.
